notes: Drive Belt fix requires Jaw Safety Retrofit first
Speed Enhancement requires Drive Belt correction

Energy module requires updated CIP valve actuators
Separator overhaul requires HX gaskets replaced first for CIP integrity
Cap applicator upgrade needs new servo motors installed
Volume conversion to 1000ml incompatible with speed enhancement for 250ml
Cannot apply two volume conversions simultaneously

Jaw safety and drive belt should be done in same service visit
PHE gaskets and CIP valve fix can share downtime window
